hooks.command: bash -c 'if ps aux | grep -q "[r]un_paper_live\|[r]un_supervisor"; then LAST=$(grep "Candle closed" /Users/pprathmeshsmacbook/Documents/TBot_Project/TBot/logs/paper_live.log 2>/dev/null | tail -1); if [ -n "$LAST" ]; then TS=$(echo "$LAST" | grep -oP "\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2} \d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2}"); NOW=$(date -u +"%s"); LAST_SEC=$(date -u -j -f "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S" "$TS" +"%s" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$LAST_SEC" ]; then GAP=$((NOW - LAST_SEC)); if [ $GAP -gt 360 ]; then echo "[TBOT-HOOK] ⚠ WARNING: last candle was ${GAP}s ago (>${360}s threshold) — stream may be stalled"; fi; fi; fi; fi'
